Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Silent Servants]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Underlord ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|'''Ch 22''' — The Silent Servants have bound mouths.}}

== Uncrowned ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|'''Ch 10''' — The Silent Servants are a cult of the Silent King.}}

== Wintersteel ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 6''' — Juvari is of the Silent Servants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 7''' — No Silent Servant made the top eight.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent Servants possess a floating island covered by a giant pure-white tree.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 19''' — An archer among the Silent Servants fired an arrow of light.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|'''Ch 24''' — The Silent Servants are one of the groups surrounding the valley.}}

== Reaper ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-10-reaper|'''Ch 10''' — The island of the Silent Servants features a shining white tree.}}

== Dreadgod ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|'''Ch 18''' — The Silent Servants is a cult of the tiger Dreadgod.}}

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 32''' — The Silent Servants settled to the west amidst the ruins of Mount Venture.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 8''' — Silent Servants are well-known spies and liars.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 13''' — The Silent Servants have madra that can glow with intention.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
